system.description:
Famous Jewel

This gem is the elegant centerpiece on the back of a peculiar clockwork gauntlet. A seer can use the gauntlet to travel into the Ghost Field while retaining physical presence, or possibly even other dimensions. Each use burns out some of the diamond facets. The device is reported to have a mind of its own.

Ever since its theft from the Adelairde family, the gauntlet has surfaced only in rumors of especially daring heists or mind-shattering experiments.
